overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through the Badlands desert area. The player moves along a sandy trail past Joshua trees and rocky hills, with the distant Night City skyline gradually coming into view under a bright clear sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert valley trail with rocky hillside

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a sandy desert trail with rocky terrain on the left side

entered.detail: large reddish-brown rocky hill forming the left boundary of the valley
distinctive yucca trees with spiky leaves scattered across the desert landscape
sandy path winding through the desert terrain
low-lying reddish vegetation patches dotting the sandy ground

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a desert valley with a prominent rocky hillside on the left. Scattered Joshua trees and red desert shrubs dot the sandy terrain under bright direct sunlight. The path winds gently through the semi-enclosed landscape with clear blue skies overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert with distant city skyline

events.description: red warning UI indicator appears at the top of the screen indicating an alert state
distant futuristic city skyline becomes visible on the horizon as the terrain opens up

agents.ego_description: continuing through the desert as the landscape opens to reveal the distant city ahead

entered.detail: futuristic metropolis with tall buildings and towers visible on the distant horizon
expansive flat desert terrain stretching toward the city

segments.scene_description: The valley opens into wide desert plains as the camera continues forward. A distant futuristic city skyline appears on the horizon, marking the edge of the desert. A red warning indicator appears on screen as the player moves through increasingly open terrain with scattered Joshua trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert plain overlooking distant city

agents.ego_description: traversing the open desert terrain with the city skyline prominently visible ahead

entered.detail: clusters of green and reddish desert shrubs in the foreground

segments.scene_description: The camera continues across the open desert landscape with the city skyline now prominently positioned ahead. Various desert bushes and Joshua trees pass by as the terrain remains flat and exposed. The distant city remains a constant feature on the horizon under the bright midday sun.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a secluded desert valley that gradually opens into a vast plain dominated by a distant futuristic skyline. It begins by winding through a semi-enclosed landscape, passing a prominent rocky hillside and scattered Joshua trees under bright direct sunlight. As the camera continues forward, the valley walls recede and the terrain expands into wide desert plains, revealing the first glimpse of a city on the horizon alongside a red warning indicator on screen. The scene then shifts into a fully exposed landscape where the camera glides past desert bushes and shrubs, with the city skyline growing more prominent against the clear midday sky.
